generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a friend's post about mandatory service. Look, I get the freedom argument, but let's be real - our allies are pulling their weight while we're left vulnerable. Drafts aren't about taking rights away; they're about ensuring we can defend ourselves when it counts. Countries with service programs have stronger defense readiness. Why should we be the exception? #NationalSecurity #ServiceMatters
